path.id: â€œThey knew not the truth of their own beingâ€”the road cleaved in agony from the primeval mire had long been ground to dust by oblivion; the path ahead, where thorns veil the sky and no end reveals itself, was never once lit by a single star. They could not even recognize themselves as these frail flecks of existence standing between heaven and earth, as though their names and souls had scattered in the lingering winds of creation. And the more they staggered to the crumbling edge of the abyss, the more they sank into a silence that swallowed all soundâ€”like the final hush before the gods closed their eyes.â€
a bioluminescent anomaly of the LyRiverse
